exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["C001", None]})
print(int(df["id"].isna().sum()))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Packet: count nulls on required id with isna().sum().
Hints: iterate policy; only required with n>0 → violations dict.
Transfer: print fail if any required violations else pass.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"monto": [1.0, None]})
df = df.copy()
df["was_null"] = df["monto"].isna()
df["monto"] = df["monto"].fillna(0)
print(df["was_null"].tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Capture was_null before fillna; print flag list.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"monto": [1.0, None, None, 2.0]})
rate = float(df["monto"].isna().mean())
print("blocked" if rate > 0.3 else "ok")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Null rate 2/4 > 0.3 → blocked.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, 2.0, None])
med = s.median()
filled = s.fillna(med)
print(float(med), filled.tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: median skipna then fillna; print med + filled list.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"a": [1, 1], "b": [2, 2]})
print(int(df.duplicated(keep=False).sum()))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Two exact rows → duplicated keep=False sum=2.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C001", "C002"], "region": ["Lima", "Cusco", "Lima"]})
conf = df.groupby("cliente_id")["region"].nunique()
print(conf[conf > 1].index.tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: groupby nunique>1 → conflict keys.
Ordered classify; single clean row → clean.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["a", "a", "b"], "v": [1, 2, 3]})
q = df[df.duplicated("id", keep=False)].copy()
clean = df.drop_duplicates("id", keep="first")
print(len(q), len(clean))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Demo pattern: quarantine dups vs clean keep first.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["a", "a", "b"], "batch": ["b1", "b2", "b1"], "v": [1, 2, 3]})
q = df[df.duplicated("id", keep=False)][["id", "batch"]].copy()
print(q.columns.tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Keep batch as evidence column in quarantine view.

vals = s.str.replace("S/", "", regex=False).astype(float)
print(float(vals.sum()))

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, -2.0, 3.0])
print((s < 0).tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Domain mask s<0.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1, 2, 3, 100])
q1, q3 = s.quantile(0.25), s.quantile(0.75)
iqr = q3 - q1
stat = (s < q1 - 1.5 * iqr) | (s > q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
print(s[stat].tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Tukey 1.5*IQR fences; list outliers.

df = pd.DataFrame({"inicio": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-01", "2024-05-01"]), "fin": pd.to_datetime(["2024-02-01", "2024-04-01"])})

exercises.justification_from_packet: Cross-field: fin < inicio row indices.
